basics.name: Douglas Moura
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software engineer with 6+ years of experience shipping design systems, banking apps, auction platforms, AI agents, and healthcare software for enterprise clients. Currently building healthcare solutions at Jaya Tech. Previously built LLM-powered products and AI agents at Caylent on AWS. Co-founded Konkreta, Brazil's main concrete ordering platform, and founded Engenharia Livre, an engineering blog with 40k+ followers. Started in civil engineering — graduated, managed construction projects — then made the leap to software.

work.name: Jaya Tech
highlights: Building software for the healthcare market

work.name: Caylent
work.summary: Built AI-powered products on AWS, including internal LLM chat tools and AI agents for business automation.
highlights: Built an internal ChatGPT-like tool where users can select LLM models, upload documents, and chat — using Amazon Bedrock, Lambda (Python), DynamoDB, and React
Developed AI agents to increase customer conversion and product utility using Amazon Bedrock and CrewAI
Implemented quality evaluation tests for AI agent responses and RAG pipelines with DeepEval

work.name: Trela
work.summary: Full-stack development on a Next.js platform, building design systems, BFFs, microservices, and data infrastructure.
highlights: Built a custom design system with React and Styled Components, tested with Jest and Playwright
Optimized SEO for the Next.js application
Migrated styles from Styled Components to CSS Modules for better performance
Created BFFs to connect microservices using Koa and GraphQL
Built and migrated microservices from Flask to FastAPI
Deployed applications on AWS using Terraform via GitHub Actions
Created data dashboards using Snowflake and Metabase
Implemented feature flags on backend and frontend (Unleash, then PostHog)
Implemented an AWS Lambda proxy for feature flags
Used the outbox pattern for microservice messaging with RabbitMQ

work.name: DBServer
work.summary: Migrated a banking application from Angular to React and built supporting design systems and backend services.
highlights: Migrated a banking application from Angular.js and Angular 2 to React
Created a design system with React and Styled Components, documented with Storybook
Used MobX for application state management
Built the application BFF with Nest.js

work.name: Gama Academy
work.summary: Taught web development to aspiring developers.
highlights: Delivered training on React, Next.js, Storybook, CSS Modules, Jest, Cypress, and TDD
Mentored career-changers entering the tech industry

work.name: Avanade
work.summary: Built design systems, auction platforms, and internal tools for enterprise clients in healthcare, mining, and cosmetics.
highlights: Built a custom design system from scratch for QSaúde using React, Stitches, and Radix
Developed an iron ore auction system for the Chinese market for Vale using the WeChat MiniProgram framework
Documented the entire legacy C# backend and started migration to Node.js with full test coverage
Trained frontend engineers in React, Jest, SWR, and Cypress
Developed a Microsoft Dynamics application in Mithril.js and React
Created internal tools with React for Natura

work.name: VOLLUP.COM
work.summary: Built digital marketing solutions for mid-to-large companies with PHP, JavaScript, and WordPress.
highlights: Developed custom WordPress themes
Built a PHP system to convert Photoshop designs into HTML layouts for web and email marketing
Configured high-performance servers for WordPress hosting

work.name: Konkreta
work.summary: Co-founded Brazil's main concrete ordering platform.
highlights: Built the ordering platform with Ruby on Rails
Established commercial partnerships with concrete suppliers in the São Paulo metro area
Routed customer orders to the nearest suppliers

work.name: Constrinew Engenharia
work.summary: Managed residential and commercial construction projects, including electrical and plumbing design.
highlights: Designed and implemented residential electrical and plumbing systems
Managed and planned residential and commercial construction projects
Hired technical teams for all construction phases

work.name: Pöyry Tecnologia
work.summary: Developed engineering projects and implemented advanced solutions with Revit, Excel, Access, and VBA.
highlights: Developed engineering projects using Revit
Implemented advanced engineering solutions with Excel, Access, and VBA

work.name: TeleTech
work.summary: Provided bilingual technical support for shared web hosting services, bridging Brazilian and US/Mexico teams.
highlights: Served as the technical point of contact with the foreign shared hosting provider
Translated demands between the Brazilian and US/Mexico teams
Last point of contact and resolver for customer service issues

work.name: TeleTech
work.summary: Analyzed and resolved email deliverability and shared hosting issues, and trained new customers.
highlights: Analyzed and fixed email deliverability issues
Analyzed and fixed shared web hosting problems
Trained new customers on internal tools

work.name: Blog da Engenharia
work.summary: Developed and maintained an engineering blog on WordPress, including custom themes and job board integration.
highlights: Developed a custom WordPress theme optimized for email capture
Built a job board connected to vagas.com.br
Migrated the blog to a more robust AWS server
Automated social media publishing for new articles

volunteer.summary: Organize free meetups for the Brazilian software development community, moderate the Discord server, and contribute articles on dev.to/nodebr.
